books.name: Interpreting The Saying Of Allah, The Mighty And Sublime: When You Intend To Offer Salah (The Prayer), wash your faces and your hands (forearms) up to your elbows
books.arabicName: باب تَأْوِيلِ قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏{‏ إِذَا قُمْتُمْ إِلَى الصَّلاَةِ فَاغْسِلُوا وُجُوهَكُمْ وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ إِلَى الْمَرَافِقِ ‏}‏ ‏‏

books.name: Allah, The Mighty and Sublime, says: And We sent down pure water from the sky. [1] And He, the Mighty and Sublime, says: And He caused water to descend on you from the sky, to clean you thereby. [2] And He, the Most High, says: And you find no water, then perform Tayammum with clean earth [3]
books.arabicName: باب  قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏{‏ وَأَنْزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً طَهُورًا ‏}‏ وَقَالَ تَعَالَى ‏{‏ فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا مَاءً فَتَيَمَّمُوا صَعِيدًا طَيِّبًا ‏}‏
